calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Continued To Aug-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that they were having calendaring problems, that he was not told this matter was on calendar, that they are making changes to prevent this and that they are not getting any replies from the Latvian Immigration. Mr. Weinkauf also stated that they don't have any leads, that nobody knows anything about this person, that they contacted the Office of Citizenship & Migration by e-mail on February 2, 2017, that he has checked the computer and has had no response to the e-mail, that it is unlikely they are going to get any response, and that the Public Administrator should get appointed and proceed. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on April 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear. The Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Feb-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
